$description: Component tokens for Mobile Modal Header component - a header component for modal dialogs and bottom sheets with optional drag handle, back icon, title with optional icon and subtext, and close icon. Supports two layout variants (Left and Center) for flexible content alignment. Figma Reference: Node ID 565-22542

$component.name: Modal Header
$component.description: A mobile modal header component that provides navigation and context at the top of modal dialogs and bottom sheets. Features an optional drag handle for bottom sheet interaction, optional back icon for navigation, flexible content section with optional icon, title text, and optional subtext, and optional close icon for dismissal. Supports two layout variants: Left-aligned (standard) and Center-aligned (centered title with balanced spacing).
$component.structure: Container with white background and rounded top corners. Contains optional drag handle at top, followed by header contents section with horizontal flex layout. Header contents include: optional back icon, content group (optional icon + title with optional subtext), and optional close icon. Layout adapts based on variant (Left vs Center) affecting content alignment and spacing.

sizes.default: Variable height based on content - minimum height accommodates drag handle (8px) + gap (8px) + header contents (36px minimum) + padding (12px top, 12px horizontal)

layout.left: Left-aligned layout - back icon and content group aligned to left, close icon aligned to right
layout.center: Center-aligned layout - content group centered with balanced spacing on both sides, back icon and close icon on edges

drag-handle.present: Drag handle displayed at top of header (8px height, 69px width, rounded pill shape)

back-icon.present: Back icon (arrow-left) displayed on left side (36px size)

close-icon.present: Close icon (x) displayed on right side (36px size)

content-icon.present: Content icon displayed before title (36px size)

usage.contexts: Mobile modal dialogs, bottom sheets, slide-up panels, full-screen modals, action sheets, confirmation dialogs
usage.features: Optional drag handle for bottom sheet interaction, Flexible navigation (back/close icons), Flexible content (icon, title, subtext), Two layout variants (Left/Center), Rounded top corners for modal appearance

container.$comment: Container tokens for mobile modal header - background, padding, border radius, and layout

default.description: Mobile modal header default background - neutral/white - #ffffff

left.description: Mobile modal header top-left border radius - 8px

right.description: Mobile modal header top-right border radius - 8px

drag-handle.description: Mobile modal header gap between drag handle and header contents - 8px

header-contents.description: Mobile modal header gap between header content elements - 8px

drag-handle.$comment: Drag handle tokens - optional visual indicator for bottom sheet dragging

width.description: Mobile modal header drag handle width - 68px (closest to 69px design spec)

height.description: Mobile modal header drag handle height - 8px

default.description: Mobile modal header drag handle default background - neutral/gray-200 - #eaecf0

radius.description: Mobile modal header drag handle border radius - fully rounded/pill shape - 1000px

back-icon.$comment: Back icon tokens - optional left navigation icon

size.description: Mobile modal header back icon size - 36px

default.description: Mobile modal header back icon default color - neutral/gray-600 - #475467

content.$comment: Content section tokens - icon, title, and subtext group

elements.description: Mobile modal header gap between content elements (icon, title section) - 8px

title-section.description: Mobile modal header gap between title section elements (title text, subtext) - 4px

icon.$comment: Content icon tokens - optional icon displayed before title

size.description: Mobile modal header content icon size - 36px

default.description: Mobile modal header content icon default color - neutral/gray-600 - #475467

typography.description: Mobile modal header title typography - 20px bold, 30px line height

default.description: Mobile modal header title default color - neutral/gray-900 - #101828

subtext.$comment: Subtext tokens - optional text displayed below title

typography.description: Mobile modal header subtext typography - 16px regular, 24px line height

default.description: Mobile modal header subtext default color - neutral/gray-500 - #667085

close-icon.$comment: Close icon tokens - optional right dismissal icon

size.description: Mobile modal header close icon size - 36px

default.description: Mobile modal header close icon default color - neutral/gray-600 - #475467
